name: Mal'Ganis
description: A self-sustaining Tank that peels for allies and disrupts enemies.
title: Nathrezim Lord
info: Cunning and intelligent, Mal'Ganis was chosen to bring Arthas Menethil into the Lich King’s service. After manipulating the prince into purging Stratholme of life, he finally fell to Frostmourne as Arthas's first act as the Lich King's champion... yet a demon does not die so easily.

MalGanis.name: Fel Claws
MalGanis.description: Violently slash in the chosen direction, dealing 66 (+4% per level) damage to enemies.  Reactivate to slash up to 2 more times. The third slash Stuns enemies for 0.75 seconds.

MalGanis.name: Necrotic Embrace
MalGanis.description: Desecrate the air, dealing 121 (+4% per level) damage to nearby enemies and gaining 15 Spell Armor for 3 Seconds.  This ability's base damage provides double healing from Vampiric Touch.

MalGanis.name: Night Rush
MalGanis.description: After 0.75 seconds, gain 50% Movement Speed for 2 seconds. While active, Mal'Ganis can move through enemy Heroes and put them to Sleep for 2.5 seconds.

MalGanis.name: Dark Conversion
MalGanis.description: Channel on an enemy Hero for 0.75 seconds, then swap Health percentages with the target over 3 seconds.

MalGanis.name: Carrion Swarm
MalGanis.description: After 1 second, disperse into an Invulnerable swarm of bats for 3 seconds, dealing 120 (+4% per level) damage per second to enemies.  Vampiric Touch heals for 75% of Carrion Swarm's damage to Heroes.

MalGanis.name: Vampiric Touch
MalGanis.description: Mal'Ganis heals for 45% of damage dealt to enemy Heroes and 10% of damage dealt to non-Heroes.

1.name: Will of Tichondrius
1.description: Quest: Hit Heroes with Fel Claws to permanently increase Fel Claw's damage by 0.5. Quest: Hit 4 Heroes in the first 2 slashes to cause the final slash to increase damage by 2.  Reward: Upon gaining 40 bonus Damage, the final Stun is increased by 0.5 seconds and the final slash steals 4% of enemy Hero Health.

1.name: Winged Guard
1.description: Each time Necrotic Embrace hits an enemy Hero, gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack.  If Winged Guard has no charges, Mal'Ganis will gain 1 charge after 6 seconds.

1.name: Time to Feed
1.description: Mal'Ganis heals for 70 (+4% per level) when damaging a nearby enemy Hero. This can occur once every 6 seconds against each enemy Hero, but is also refreshed when they are Slept by Night Rush.

4.name: Might of Sargeras
4.description: Necrotic Embrace now provides 35 Armor for 3 seconds.

4.name: Echo of Doom
4.description: When Necrotic Embrace expires, it explodes again for 68 (+4% per level) damage. For each enemy Hero hit, gain 5 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Necrotic Embrace by 0.75 seconds.  Does not wake Sleeping targets.

4.name: Vampiric Aura
4.description: Mal'Ganis heals for 40% of Physical Damage dealt, and nearby allied Heroes heal for 20% of Physical Damage dealt.

7.name: Black Claws
7.description: After Mal'Ganis hits an enemy Hero with Fel Claws, his next Basic Attack deals 60% more damage and reduces the Armor of enemy Heroes by 15 for 2 seconds.

7.name: Fueled by Torment
7.description: Necrotic Embrace now Slows nearby enemies by 25% for 3 seconds.

7.name: Spreading Plague
7.description: After casting Night Rush, deal 33 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. This effect lasts for 5 seconds and Basic Attacks against Heroes refresh its duration.  Does not wake Sleeping targets.

10.name: Carrion Swarm
10.description: After 1 second, disperse into an Invulnerable swarm of bats for 3 seconds, dealing 120 (+4% per level) damage per second to enemies.  Vampiric Touch heals for 75% of Carrion Swarm's damage to Heroes.

10.name: Dark Conversion
10.description: Channel on an enemy Hero for 0.75 seconds, then swap Health percentages with the target over 3 seconds.

13.name: Deep Sleep
13.description: Increase Night Rush's Sleep duration by 0.75 seconds and its Movement Speed bonus by 10%.

13.name: The Night Beckons
13.description: Basic Attacks deal 200% bonus damage to Sleeping enemies. After Night Rush's Sleep ends, targets are Slowed by 30% for 3 seconds.

13.name: Blood Rush
13.description: When Mal'Ganis is healed by a Hero, he gains 1% Movement Speed for 6 seconds, up to 15%.

16.name: Plague Bats
16.description: Necrotic Embrace unleashes a wave of bats in front of Mal'Ganis, dealing 81 (+4% per level) damage.

16.name: Frenzied Assault
16.description: Basic Attacks against Heroes with a higher Health percentage heal for an additional 50% of damage dealt.  Basic Attacks against Heroes with a lower Health percentage grant 35% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.

16.name: Blind as a Bat
16.description: Activate to erupt with blind rage, removing the cooldown and Mana cost of Fel Claws, but losing all vision. Lasts 5.5 seconds.  Enemy Heroes hit by the final slash of Fel Claws reduces the cooldown of this Ability by 4 seconds.  Does not provide quest stacks while active.

20.name: Seeker Swarm
20.description: Upon expiring, Carrion Swarm's bats seek nearby enemy Heroes, dealing 132 (+4% per level) damage and Sleeping them for 2.5 seconds.

20.name: Wrath of Nathreza
20.description: Enemy Heroes near the target suffer 75% of the transferred Health as damage over 3 seconds.  Does not benefit from Vampiric Touch.

20.name: Vanquish the Weak
20.description: Damage from Fel Claws and Basic Attacks Slows enemies by 25% for 1.5 seconds, and Vampiric Touch converts 10% more damage into healing versus Slowed Heroes.

20.name: Alone in the Dark
20.description: Reduce the cooldown of Night Rush by 4 seconds. Enemy Heroes put to Sleep by Night Rush have their vision greatly reduced during the Sleep and for 2 seconds after.

tooltipMarkup.MalGanisCarrionSwarm: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisCarrionSwarmDelay,Duration"/></c> second, disperse into an Invulnerable swarm of bats for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisCarrionSwarmCaster,Duration"/></c> seconds, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="1/Effect,MalGanisCarrionSwarmSearchPersistent,Marker.Duration*Effect,MalGanisCarrionSwarmDamage,Amount"/></c> damage per second to enemies.<n/><n/>Vampiric Touch heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalGanisCarrionSwarmDamage,LeechFraction[Life]*100"/>%</c> of Carrion Swarm's damage to Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisCarrionSwarmSeekerSwarm: Upon expiring, Carrion Swarm's bats seek nearby enemy Heroes, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalGanisCarrionSwarmSeekerSwarmDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Sleeping them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisCarrionSwarmSeekerSwarmSleep,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisDarkConversion: Channel on an enemy Hero for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,MalGanisDarkConversion,CastIntroTime" precision="2"/></c> seconds, then swap Health percentages with the target over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisDarkConversionSwapDoT,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisDarkConversionWrathOfNathreza: Enemy Heroes near the target suffer <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalGanisDarkConversionWrathOfNathrezaAoESwapMultiplier,Amount*100"/>%</c> of the transferred Health as damage over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisDarkConversionWrathOfNathrezaSwapDoT,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Does not benefit from Vampiric Touch.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisFelClawsBlackClaws: After Mal'Ganis hits an enemy Hero with Fel Claws, his next Basic Attack deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalGanisWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[BlackClaws].Modifier*100"/>%</c> more damage and reduces the Armor of enemy Heroes by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,MalganisFelClawsBlackClawsArmorReduction,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalganisFelClawsBlackClawsArmorReduction,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisFelClawsBlindAsABat: Activate to erupt with blind rage, removing the cooldown and Mana cost of Fel Claws, but losing all vision. Lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisFelClawsBlindAsABatBehavior,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds. <n/><n/>Enemy Heroes hit by the final slash of Fel Claws reduces the cooldown of this Ability by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,MalganisFelClawsBlindAsABatCooldownReduction,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"/></c> seconds.</n></n>Does not provide quest stacks while active.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisFelClawsFirst: Violently slash in the chosen direction, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalGanisFelClawsDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies.<n/><n/>Reactivate to slash up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisFelClawsTimer,MaxStackCount"/></c> more times. The third slash Stuns enemies for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisFelClawsStun,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisFelClawsVanquishTheWeak: Damage from Fel Claws and Basic Attacks Slows enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisFelClawsVanquishTheWeakSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-100)"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisFelClawsVanquishTheWeakSlow,Duration" precision="1"/></c> seconds, and Vampiric Touch converts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalGanisWeaponDamage,LeechFlatModifierArray[VanquishTheWeak].Modifier*100" player="0"/>%</c> more damage into healing versus Slowed Heroes.

For each enemy Hero hit, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalganisNecroticEmbraceEchoOfDoomManaReturn,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Mana and reduce the cooldown of Necrotic Embrace by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,MalganisNecroticEmbraceEchoOfDoomCooldownReduction,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"Precision="2"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Does not wake Sleeping targets.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisNecroticEmbraceFueledByTorment: Necrotic Embrace now Slows nearby enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">25%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers">3</c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisNecroticEmbraceMightOfSargeras: Necrotic Embrace now provides <c val="#TooltipNumbers">35</c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisNecroticEmbraceArmor,Duration"/></c> seconds.</c>
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisNecroticEmbracePlagueBats: Necrotic Embrace unleashes a wave of bats in front of Mal'Ganis, dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalGanisNecroticEmbracePlagueBatsDamage,Amount"/></c> damage.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisNecroticEmbraceWingedGuard: Each time Necrotic Embrace hits an enemy Hero, gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisNecroticEmbraceWingedGuardArmorBehavior,ArmorModification.ArmorSet[Hero].ArmorMitigationTable[Basic]"/></c> Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack.</n></n>If Winged Guard has no charges, Mal'Ganis will gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> charge after <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisNecroticEmbraceWingedGuardChargeCountdown,Duration"/></c> seconds.

While active, Mal'Ganis can move through enemy Heroes and put them to Sleep for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisNightRushSleep,Duration" player="0" precision="1"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisNightRushAloneInTheDark: Reduce the cooldown of Night Rush by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,MalGanisNightRushAloneInTheDark,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value"Player="0"/></c> seconds. Enemy Heroes put to Sleep by Night Rush have their vision greatly reduced during the Sleep and for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalGanisNightRushAloneInTheDarkModifyTriggerBehavior,Value"/></c> seconds after.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisNightRushDeepSleep: Increase Night Rush's Sleep duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,MalGanisNightRushDeepSleep,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds and its Movement Speed bonus by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,MalGanisNightRushDeepSleep,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value*100" player="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisNightRushSpreadingPlague: After casting Night Rush, deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalGanisNightRushSpreadingPlagueDamage,Amount"/></C> damage per second to nearby enemies. This effect lasts for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisNightRushSpreadingPlagueBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds and Basic Attacks against Heroes refresh its duration.<n/><n/>Does not wake Sleeping targets.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisNightRushTheNightBeckons: Basic Attacks deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,MalGanisWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[NightBeckonsSleep].Modifier"/>%</c> bonus damage to Sleeping enemies. After Night Rush's Sleep ends, targets are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisNightRushTheNightBeckonsSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*(-100)"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisNightRushTheNightBeckonsSlow,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisVampiricTouch: Mal'Ganis heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="(Effect,MalGanisWeaponDamage,LeechFlatModifierArray[IsHero].Modifier+Effect,MalGanisWeaponDamage,LeechFraction[Life])*(100)" player="0"/>%</c> of damage dealt to enemy Heroes and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalGanisWeaponDamage,LeechFraction[Life]*100" player="0"/>%</c> of damage dealt to non-Heroes.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisVampiricTouchBloodRush: When Mal'Ganis is healed by a Hero, he gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,MalGanisVampiricTouchBloodRushMoveSpeedAccumulator,Scale*100"/>%</c> Movement Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisVampiricTouchBloodRushMoveSpeed,Duration"/></c> seconds, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,MalGanisVampiricTouchBloodRushMoveSpeedAccumulator,MaxAccumulation*100"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisVampiricTouchFrenziedAssault: Basic Attacks against Heroes with a higher Health percentage heal for an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,MalGanisWeaponDamage,LeechFlatModifierArray[FrenziedAssault].Modifier"/>%</c> of damage dealt.<n/><n/>Basic Attacks against Heroes with a lower Health percentage grant <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisVampiricTouchFrenziedAssaultBehavior,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c> Attack Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisVampiricTouchFrenziedAssaultBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisVampiricTouchTimeToFeed: Mal'Ganis heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,MalGanisVampiricTouchTimeToFeedHeal,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> when damaging a nearby enemy Hero. This can occur once every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisVampiricTouchTimeToFeedCooldownBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds against each enemy Hero, but is also refreshed when they are Slept by Night Rush.
tooltipMarkup.MalGanisVampiricTouchVampiricAura: Mal'Ganis heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Talent,MalGanisVampiricTouchVampiricAura,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"/>%</c> of Physical Damage dealt, and nearby allied Heroes heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,MalGanisVampiricTouchVampiricAuraLeechBehavior,Modification.VitalDamageLeechArray[Life].KindArray[Basic]*100"/>%</c> of Physical Damage dealt.
